evals.name: pm-document-exchange-components
evals.prompt:
Create the 3 document exchange components for a PM (property manager) portal variant. The portal path is 'pm'. Write:

1. DocumentExchangePageContent.tsx — the main content wrapper. It should use useSortRequestsByRequestGroup to sort requests, handle anchor-based scroll highlighting via useSearchParams, and render DocumentExchangeRequestGroup for each group. NO message modal (this is PM, not FSP).

2. DocumentExchangeRequestGroup.tsx — collapsible group with progress stats. Uses Collapsible from @finstreet/ui, FaAngleDown icon, shows 'X of Y required' tag. Returns null if totalRequestAmount is 0. Use color 'text.light' for the tag (PM variant).

3. DocumentExchangeRequestDisplay.tsx — individual document request card. Wraps @finstreet/ui DocumentRequest. Handles download errors with Banner. Hides completed via useDocumentExchangeSwitch. Maps document tags to extract 'new' label. NO sendMessage callback, NO DocumentTags (PM variant).

Write all files under outputs/src/features/documentExchange/pm/components/
evals.expected_output: 3 client components following the PM document exchange pattern: PageContent without message modal, RequestGroup with text.light color, RequestDisplay without sendMessage/DocumentTags.
expectations: PageContent is 'use client', uses useSortRequestsByRequestGroup + useSearchParams for anchor handling, renders RequestGroup per group, does NOT include DocumentRelatedMessageModal
RequestGroup is 'use client', uses Collapsible from @finstreet/ui, FaAngleDown icon, shows tag with uploadedRequiredAmount/totalRequiredAmount, returns null when empty, uses text.light color

RequestDisplay is 'use client', wraps DocumentRequest from @finstreet/ui, handles download errors with Banner, uses useDocumentExchangeSwitch for hide-completed, does NOT have sendMessage or DocumentTags

evals.name: fsp-document-exchange-components
evals.prompt:
Create the 3 document exchange components for an FSP (operations) portal variant. The portal path is 'fsp'. Write:

1. DocumentExchangePageContent.tsx — the main content wrapper. Uses useSortRequestsByRequestGroup to sort requests, handles anchor-based scroll highlighting via useSearchParams, renders DocumentExchangeRequestGroup for each group. Includes DocumentRelatedMessageModal at the bottom (FSP variant).

2. DocumentExchangeRequestGroup.tsx — collapsible group with progress stats. Uses Collapsible from @finstreet/ui, FaAngleDown icon, shows 'X of Y required' tag. Returns null if totalRequestAmount is 0. Use color 'text.dark' for the tag (FSP variant).

3. DocumentExchangeRequestDisplay.tsx — individual document request card. Wraps @finstreet/ui DocumentRequest. Handles download errors with Banner. Hides completed via useDocumentExchangeSwitch. Maps document tags to extract 'new' label AND renders DocumentTags component. Has sendMessage callback that opens useDocumentRelatedMessageModal (FSP variant).

Write all files under outputs/src/features/documentExchange/fsp/components/
evals.expected_output: 3 client components following the FSP document exchange pattern: PageContent with message modal, RequestGroup with text.dark color, RequestDisplay with sendMessage and DocumentTags.
expectations: PageContent is 'use client', uses useSortRequestsByRequestGroup + useSearchParams, renders RequestGroup per group, INCLUDES DocumentRelatedMessageModal after PageContent
RequestGroup is 'use client', uses Collapsible from @finstreet/ui, FaAngleDown icon, shows tag with uploadedRequiredAmount/totalRequiredAmount, returns null when empty, uses text.dark color

RequestDisplay is 'use client', wraps DocumentRequest, handles download errors with Banner, uses useDocumentExchangeSwitch, HAS sendMessage callback using useDocumentRelatedMessageModal, HAS DocumentTags in documents map
